about

Software engineer, bowhunter, archer, dad. I build things in Ruby and watch the trees.

This site is where I write — about code, the woods, and the overlap between the two. The same habits that make you a better programmer make you a better hunter: patience, observation, iteration, and showing up.

More coming soon.
